name: ORNA Ransomware Response
description: Comprehensive ORNA ransomware incident response playbook covering identification through lessons learned

steps.title: Setup War Room
steps.description: Set up secure communication channel for CIRT members. Establish physical or virtual war room with restricted access.

steps.title: Inform CIRT and Perform Triage
steps.description: Notify CIRT team members, verify incident severity and type, establish scope and root cause.

steps.title: Notify Legal, Insurance and Law Enforcement
steps.description: Notify legal counsel, cybersecurity insurance provider/broker, and appropriate law enforcement agencies.

steps.title: Issue Internal and External Communications
steps.description: Establish proactive communication with staff and stakeholders. Control narrative and maintain trust.

steps.title: Invoke Data Breach Notification Protocols
steps.description: Determine notification requirements under applicable laws (GDPR, CCPA, PIPEDA, etc.) and notify affected parties.

steps.title: Disconnect Affected Assets
steps.description: Isolate infected systems from network. Do not power down devices to preserve forensic evidence.

steps.title: Scan Network for Additional Malware
steps.description: Detect and eliminate additional malware, backdoors, and persistence mechanisms used by threat actors.

steps.title: Protect Backups
steps.description: Ensure backups are protected and not overwritten. Verify backup integrity and availability.

steps.title: Invoke Business Continuity Plan
steps.description: Activate BCP to minimize business disruption. Consider MTD, RPO, RTO, and WRT metrics.

steps.title: Identify and Mitigate Vulnerabilities
steps.description: Run vulnerability scans, implement mitigation recommendations, and prevent similar attacks.

steps.title: Restore from Backups
steps.description: Restore affected systems from clean, verified backups. Verify system integrity before reconnecting to network.

steps.title: Generate Incident Report
steps.description: Prepare comprehensive incident report for stakeholders, compliance, and lessons learned.

steps.title: Host Lessons Learned Session
steps.description: Conduct post-incident review, identify gaps, and implement improvements to prevent future incidents.

name: ORNA Phishing Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to phishing attacks and business email compromise

steps.title: Setup War Room
steps.description: Establish secure communication channel for CIRT team. Set up physical or virtual war room.

steps.title: Verify and Triage Phishing Email
steps.description: Confirm phishing attempt, analyze headers/links/attachments, determine scope and affected users.

steps.title: Identify Recipients
steps.description: Search email logs to identify all recipients. Determine who clicked links or opened attachments.

steps.title: Quarantine and Block
steps.description: Remove phishing emails from mailboxes, block sender, and blacklist malicious URLs.

steps.title: Check for Compromises
steps.description: Scan for malware, check for credential compromise, and assess data exfiltration risk.

steps.title: Reset Compromised Credentials
steps.description: Force password resets for affected users. Enable MFA if not already active.

steps.title: Notify Legal and Insurance
steps.description: Alert legal counsel and insurance provider about the incident. Determine regulatory obligations.

steps.title: Employee Communication
steps.description: Send security alert to all employees. Provide clear instructions and security guidance.

steps.title: Security Awareness Training
steps.description: Conduct targeted training for affected users on identifying phishing attempts.

steps.title: Generate Incident Report
steps.description: Document incident details, response actions, and outcomes for compliance and learning.

steps.title: Lessons Learned Session
steps.description: Review incident response effectiveness, identify improvements, and update procedures.

name: ORNA Denial of Service Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to Denial of Service and DDoS attacks

steps.title: Setup War Room
steps.description: Establish secure communication channel for incident response team.

steps.title: Confirm and Triage DDoS Attack
steps.description: Verify traffic patterns, analyze network logs, confirm attack type and severity.

steps.title: Contact ISP and DDoS Mitigation Provider
steps.description: Immediately contact ISP and DDoS mitigation service to activate protection measures.

steps.title: Enable DDoS Protection
steps.description: Activate CDN, load balancers, and traffic filtering to absorb and filter attack traffic.

steps.title: Analyze Attack Vectors
steps.description: Identify attack type (volumetric, application layer, protocol) and source IPs.

steps.title: Implement Rate Limiting
steps.description: Configure rate limiting and traffic shaping to protect critical services.

steps.title: Notify Stakeholders
steps.description: Inform legal counsel, insurance, and executive leadership about the attack.

steps.title: Invoke Business Continuity Plan
steps.description: Activate BCP to minimize business disruption and maintain critical operations.

steps.title: Monitor and Adjust
steps.description: Continuously monitor attack patterns and adjust mitigation strategies as needed.

steps.title: Document and Report
steps.description: Record attack timeline, mitigation steps, and effectiveness for post-incident analysis.

steps.title: Lessons Learned
steps.description: Conduct post-incident review and implement improvements to DDoS defenses.

name: ORNA Insider Threat Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to malicious or negligent insider threats

steps.title: Setup War Room
steps.description: Establish secure, confidential communication channel for sensitive insider threat investigation.

steps.title: Verify Threat Indicators
steps.description: Review logs, access patterns, and data movement to confirm suspicious insider activity.

steps.title: Consult Legal and HR
steps.description: Immediately involve legal counsel and HR to ensure compliance with employment and privacy laws.

steps.title: Preserve Evidence
steps.description: Collect evidence including logs, emails, file access records without alerting the suspect.

steps.title: Assess Data Exfiltration
steps.description: Determine what data was accessed, copied, or transmitted outside the organization.

steps.title: Restrict Access
steps.description: Revoke suspect's access to systems, networks, and physical facilities.

steps.title: Notify Insurance and Counsel
steps.description: Inform cybersecurity insurance provider and coordinate with legal counsel on next steps.

steps.title: Conduct Investigation
steps.description: Perform detailed investigation with HR, Legal, and potentially external forensics team.

steps.title: Employee Interview
steps.description: HR and Legal conduct formal interview with the employee if appropriate.

steps.title: Determine Actions
steps.description: Decide on disciplinary action, termination, or legal prosecution based on findings.

steps.title: Remediation and Prevention
steps.description: Enhance monitoring, implement DLP solutions, and improve access controls.

steps.title: Lessons Learned
steps.description: Review incident, update insider threat program, and enhance detection capabilities.

name: ORNA Suspected Virus Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to suspected virus or malware infections

steps.title: Report and Verify Virus
steps.description: User or EDR reports virus. Check for symptoms: slow performance, pop-ups, crashes, file modifications.

steps.title: Run Initial Virus Scan
steps.description: Run BitDefender full system scan and RAM scan to detect and identify malware.

steps.title: Disconnect Affected Systems
steps.description: Isolate infected systems from network to prevent spread. Preserve forensic evidence.

steps.title: Scan Network for Additional Malware
steps.description: Ensure antivirus signatures are current. Scan all network assets for additional infections.

steps.title: Protect Backups
steps.description: Analyze backup processes and verify backup integrity. Protect backups from infection.

steps.title: Deep Scan to Remove Malware
steps.description: Run BitDefender deep scan and Malwarebytes scan. Remove malware through deletion or AV tools.

steps.title: Restore from Backup if Needed
steps.description: If system is severely compromised, restore from clean backup (files or bare metal).

steps.title: Verify System is Clean
steps.description: Confirm malware is removed. Verify system functionality before reconnecting to network.

steps.title: Generate Incident Report
steps.description: Document virus type, entry vector, impact, remediation actions, and lessons learned.

steps.title: Lessons Learned Session
steps.description: Review incident to identify gaps and implement improvements to prevent future infections.

name: ORNA General Vulnerability Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to general security vulnerabilities

steps.title: Identify Vulnerability
steps.description: Vulnerability is reported or discovered through scanning. Document CVE, CVSS score, and affected systems.

steps.title: Assess Risk and Priority
steps.description: Evaluate severity, exploitability, and business impact. Prioritize remediation based on risk.

steps.title: Check for Active Exploitation
steps.description: Review logs and IDS/IPS alerts to determine if vulnerability is being actively exploited.

steps.title: Implement Temporary Mitigations
steps.description: Apply workarounds, firewall rules, or compensating controls while patch is being prepared.

steps.title: Test Patch or Update
steps.description: Test patch in non-production environment to ensure compatibility and stability.

steps.title: Deploy Patch
steps.description: Deploy tested patch to production systems. Start with less critical systems before production.

steps.title: Verify Remediation
steps.description: Run vulnerability scan to confirm patch was successful and vulnerability is resolved.

steps.title: Document and Report
steps.description: Document vulnerability, remediation actions, and timeline. Report to stakeholders.

steps.title: Update Security Policies
steps.description: Review and update patch management and vulnerability management procedures.

name: ORNA Network IoT Incident Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to IoT device security incidents

steps.title: Setup War Room
steps.description: Establish secure communication channel for IoT incident response team.

steps.title: Identify Compromised IoT Devices
steps.description: Detect anomalous IoT device behavior through network monitoring, logs, or reports.

steps.title: Isolate Affected IoT Devices
steps.description: Disconnect compromised IoT devices from network. Use network segmentation to contain threat.

steps.title: Analyze IoT Device Compromise
steps.description: Examine device logs, firmware, and configuration to determine attack vector and scope.

steps.title: Check for Lateral Movement
steps.description: Investigate if attackers used IoT devices as pivot points to access other network resources.

steps.title: Reset and Update IoT Devices
steps.description: Factory reset compromised devices, update firmware, and change default credentials.

steps.title: Implement IoT Security Controls
steps.description: Deploy network segmentation, disable unnecessary services, and implement monitoring.

steps.title: Notify Stakeholders
steps.description: Inform legal counsel, insurance, and executive leadership about IoT security incident.

steps.title: Document and Report
steps.description: Create incident report documenting IoT device compromise, impact, and remediation.

steps.title: Lessons Learned
steps.description: Review IoT security posture and implement long-term improvements to IoT device management.

name: ORNA Offboarding Employee
description: ORNA playbook for secure employee offboarding process

steps.title: Receive Offboarding Notification
steps.description: HR notifies IT and security team of employee departure (termination, resignation, or retirement).

steps.title: Document Employee Access
steps.description: Create comprehensive list of employee's access rights, accounts, devices, and data access.

steps.title: Revoke System Access
steps.description: Disable all user accounts, VPN access, email, and application access immediately.

steps.title: Revoke Physical Access
steps.description: Deactivate building access cards, collect keys, and update physical security systems.

steps.title: Collect Company Assets
steps.description: Retrieve laptops, mobile devices, access tokens, RSA keys, and other company property.

steps.title: Backup and Transfer Data
steps.description: Backup employee's work data and transfer ownership to manager or team members.

steps.title: Review Data Access Logs
steps.description: Review employee's recent access logs for suspicious activity or data exfiltration.

steps.title: Conduct Exit Interview
steps.description: HR conducts exit interview, reminds employee of confidentiality obligations and NDA.

steps.title: Reset Shared Credentials
steps.description: Change passwords for any shared accounts or services the employee had access to.

steps.title: Monitor for Post-Departure Activity
steps.description: Monitor for unauthorized access attempts or suspicious activity for 30-60 days post-departure.

steps.title: Document Offboarding Completion
steps.description: Create offboarding checklist completion report for HR and management records.

name: ORNA Other/Hybrid Incident Response
description: ORNA playbook for hybrid or difficult-to-identify incident types

steps.title: Setup War Room
steps.description: Establish secure communication channel for incident response team to handle unknown threat.

steps.title: Initial Triage and Classification
steps.description: Collect all available information, attempt to classify incident type, and determine severity.

steps.title: Preserve Evidence
steps.description: Collect and preserve all available evidence before it's lost or contaminated.

steps.title: Determine Root Cause
steps.description: Investigate to identify the root cause, attack vector, and specific threat type.

steps.title: Implement Containment Measures
steps.description: Based on findings, implement appropriate containment to prevent further damage.

steps.title: Notify Stakeholders
steps.description: Inform legal counsel, insurance, and executive leadership about the incident.

steps.title: Issue Communications
steps.description: Prepare internal and external communications as appropriate for the incident type.

steps.title: Invoke Business Continuity Plan
steps.description: Activate BCP if incident impacts business operations.

steps.title: Eradicate Threat
steps.description: Remove all traces of the threat from affected systems based on identified threat type.

steps.title: Restore Operations
steps.description: Restore affected systems and services to normal operation.

steps.title: Generate Incident Report
steps.description: Document the hybrid incident, classification, response actions, and outcomes.

steps.title: Lessons Learned
steps.description: Review incident response effectiveness and update procedures for similar future incidents.

name: ORNA 3rd Party Breach Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to third-party vendor or supplier data breaches

steps.title: Receive Third-Party Breach Notification
steps.description: Vendor notifies organization of data breach. Document notification details and affected data.

steps.title: Setup War Room
steps.description: Establish secure communication channel for third-party breach response team.

steps.title: Assess Scope and Impact
steps.description: Determine what organizational data was affected, number of records, and sensitivity level.

steps.title: Verify Vendor Containment
steps.description: Confirm vendor has contained the breach and taken appropriate security measures.

steps.title: Review Vendor Contracts and SLAs
steps.description: Review contracts for breach notification requirements, liability, and remediation obligations.

steps.title: Determine Notification Requirements
steps.description: Identify legal obligations for breach notification under GDPR, CCPA, PIPEDA, etc.

steps.title: Notify Regulatory Authorities
steps.description: Report third-party breach to required authorities within mandated timeframes.

steps.title: Notify Affected Individuals
steps.description: Prepare and send notification to affected individuals with details and remediation steps.

steps.title: Notify Insurance Provider
steps.description: Inform cybersecurity insurance provider about third-party breach and potential claims.

steps.title: Public Communication
steps.description: Prepare public statement if required. Coordinate messaging with vendor and PR team.

steps.title: Offer Credit Monitoring
steps.description: Arrange credit monitoring services for affected individuals if PII was compromised.

steps.title: Review Vendor Relationship
steps.description: Assess vendor's security posture and determine if relationship should continue.

steps.title: Enhance Third-Party Risk Management
steps.description: Update vendor risk assessment process and security requirements in contracts.

steps.title: Document and Report
steps.description: Create comprehensive report of third-party breach impact and organizational response.

steps.title: Lessons Learned
steps.description: Review third-party breach response and improve vendor risk management program.

name: ORNA Power Outage Response
description: ORNA playbook for responding to power outages and ensuring business continuity

steps.title: Confirm Power Outage
steps.description: Verify power outage affecting data center, office, or facilities. Determine scope and estimated duration.

steps.title: Activate UPS and Backup Power
steps.description: Verify UPS systems activated. Start backup generators if available and outage is extended.

steps.title: Assess Impact on Critical Systems
steps.description: Determine which systems are affected and prioritize restoration based on business criticality.

steps.title: Notify Stakeholders
steps.description: Inform executive leadership, employees, and customers about power outage and expected impact.

steps.title: Invoke Business Continuity Plan
steps.description: Activate BCP procedures for power outage. Implement workarounds and alternate operations.

steps.title: Coordinate with Utility Provider
steps.description: Contact electric utility to get updates on restoration timeline and coordinate response.

steps.title: Monitor Battery and Generator Status
steps.description: Continuously monitor UPS battery levels and generator fuel. Plan for extended outage if needed.

steps.title: Perform Controlled Shutdown
steps.description: If backup power is depleting, perform graceful shutdown of systems to prevent data loss.

steps.title: Restore Power and Systems
steps.description: Once power is restored, systematically bring systems back online and verify functionality.

steps.title: Verify System Integrity
steps.description: Check all systems for data corruption, service availability, and proper operation.

steps.title: Notify Stakeholders of Restoration
steps.description: Inform stakeholders that power and systems are restored and operations are normal.

steps.title: Document Incident
steps.description: Create report documenting outage duration, impact, response actions, and system restoration.

steps.title: Lessons Learned
steps.description: Review power outage response, test BCP effectiveness, and improve backup power capabilities.
